description_long: This is a modern, three-seater sofa with a gently curved backrest and armrests that seamlessly flow into the main body. The upholstery is a solid, muted reddish-orange fabric with a matte finish, featuring subtle button tufting along the backrest for added visual interest. The seat consists of three individual, plush cushions that appear firmly attached, providing a uniform and structured look. The sofa stands on four short, outward-angled wooden legs, which are exposed and finished in a light natural wood tone. The overall silhouette is soft and inviting, with rounded edges and a mid-century modern aesthetic. This piece would be well-suited for urban parks, public waiting areas, or stylish outdoor lounges.
description: A modern, reddish-orange three-seater sofa with curved armrests, button-tufted backrest, and light wooden legs. The design is soft, inviting, and mid-century inspired.
description_view_0: Front view showing three seat cushions, button-tufted backrest, and both armrests.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the sofa's curved armrest and the depth of the seat.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the continuous, gently curved backrest and all four wooden legs.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, again showing the armrest curve and seat depth.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three individual, attached seat cushions in a single row; backrest features a single, continuous cushion with subtle button tufting.
attribute_armrest_style: Present, medium height, smoothly curved and integrated with the backrest, fully upholstered with no visible decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Four short, outward-angled legs placed at the corners, made of exposed light wood with a simple, tapered design.
attribute_backrest_type: Medium-height, continuous, gently curved backrest with button tufting and attached upholstery.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid color fabric with a smooth, matte texture and subtle button tufting on the backrest; no visible decorative stitching or patterns.
